arts.ttl: Portugal XI vs Croatia – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Portugal take on Croatia in the UEFA Nations League with progress to the quarter-finals already assured. Roberto Martinez’s side wrapped up top spot in the group with a 5-1 thrashing of Poland on Friday, in a fixture that saw Cristiano Ronaldo score twice. arts.ttl: Croatia vs Portugal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Croatia welcome group winners Portugal to Split this evening in the final fixture of their Nations League group. The home side are in pole position to progress to the quarter-finals alongside tonight’s opponents, but are at risk of missing out if results do not go in their favour. arts.ttl: Why is Cristiano Ronaldo not playing for Portugal against Croatia today in the Nations League?
arts.sum: Al Nassr forward Cristiano Ronaldo will play no part in Portugal’s Nations League game against Croatia tonight at Stadion Poljud in Split. “The game against Croatia is important, we need to look at other players .

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo backs Ruben Amorim for success at Man Utd
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has offered his backing to new Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim. Amorim was named as the new Man Utd head coach following the sacking of Erik ten Hag.
